name: NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day
description: Explore NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day. View today's image, browse by date, search date ranges, or get random images. Displays high-quality images, videos, explanations, and metadata.
author: Miyagi Team

inputs.name: date
inputs.label: Date
inputs.description: Specific date in YYYY-MM-DD format (for date mode)

inputs.name: start_date
inputs.label: Start Date
inputs.description: Start date for range (for range mode)

inputs.name: end_date
inputs.label: End Date
inputs.description: End date for range (for range mode)

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: Count
inputs.description: Number of random images (1-100, for random mode)

inputs.name: thumbs
inputs.label: Include Video Thumbnails
inputs.description: Return video thumbnail URLs for video APODs

outputs.name: apod
outputs.description: APOD data with image, title, explanation, and metadata
